name: Pralines and Cream Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté pecans in butter, stirring constantly, for about 5 minutes or until toasted. Set aside to cool.
2. In a large saucepan, combine 1 cup sugar, eggs, evaporated milk, and milk. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, for 20 minutes or until the mixture reaches 160°F (do not boil). Remove from heat; let cool. Stir in sweetened condensed milk and vanilla. Cover and chill at least 1 hour.
3. Fold in whipped cream.
4. In a small saucepan, cook remaining 1 cup sugar over medium heat, stirring constantly, until it dissolves and forms a smooth liquid. Stir in the sauteed pecans. (The mixture may form lumps.)
5. Stir the pecan mixture into the custard; break apart any pecan lumps.
6. Pour into a freezer-safe can of a 5-quart hand-turned or electric freezer. Freeze according to manufacturer's instructions. Let ripen at least 1 hour.
